subject: Re: Cannot open warpem.com for installation
body:
Hi,
This one works:

https://warpem.github.io/warp/￼

Best
Euan

> 
> Has anyone tried to reach warpem.com and install the windows version recently? I was trying to find a release these days but couldn't find a reliable place to go.
> 
> Thanks all,
> David
